source_note: Verified vs fundednext.com terms (Apr 2026) + reviews. Stellar 2-Step (CFD): targets 8%/5%, daily loss 5% of initial balance (expands with intraday profit, resets 00:00 server), max loss 10% of initial balance STATIC/balance-based. News trading allowed. FundedNext removed fixed minimum trading days on Stellar (set to 0) - verify current wording. Fee approximate for 100K (range ~USD60-1100 across sizes) - verify at checkout.
